message:
feat(engine): add 86 deep unit tests to claim_entitlement and hostcall_batch_transport

- claim_entitlement.rs: 39→78 (+39) — verdict computation edge cases, cut set
  minimality, entitlement graph traversal, blocked claim detection, serde for
  all enum variants, evidence hash determinism
- hostcall_batch_transport.rs: 40→87 (+47) — batch lifecycle state machine,
  transport capacity limits, session auth validation, safety membrane checks,
  batch ordering determinism, zero-copy path verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
